shangxiawuliao.name: Material Loading
shangxiawuliao.desc: Intelligent material loading & unloading system, enabling automated material handling with multi-station coordination.

dingweiduiqi.name: Positioning & Alignment
dingweiduiqi.desc: High-precision positioning & alignment system with vision-guided sub-millimeter accuracy for precision assembly.

lianjieguding.name: Connection & Fastening
lianjieguding.desc: Automated connection & fastening system supporting bolting, riveting, and snap-fit processes.

liuzhuanfuwei.name: Transfer & Reset
liuzhuanfuwei.desc: Post-assembly online verification, product sorting, and station reset to prevent defective products from flowing downstream.

quexianjiance.name: Defect Detection
quexianjiance.desc: AI vision-based defect detection system identifying scratches, cracks, and discoloration with 99.5% accuracy.

rouxingshineng.name: Flexible Enablement
rouxingshineng.desc: Flexible enablement platform using force control and compliant motion for adaptive surface processing.

wusunjiance.name: NDT Testing
wusunjiance.desc: Non-destructive testing using ultrasonic and X-ray methods to detect internal defects and ensure reliability.

xingneng.name: Performance Testing
xingneng.desc: Comprehensive product functional and performance testing covering electrical, mechanical, sealing, and environmental dimensions.

zhinengmaduo.name: Smart Palletizing
zhinengmaduo.desc: Intelligent palletizing planning system that auto-calculates optimal stacking patterns for warehouse efficiency.

cankuduijie.name: Warehouse Interface
cankuduijie.desc: Automated warehouse docking system enabling seamless integration with AGV dispatch and WMS.

chengpingbaoz.name: Product Packaging
chengpingbaoz.desc: Intelligent product packaging system integrating incoming recognition, pick planning, and method adjustment for multi-variety mixed production.

lujinguihua.name: Path Planning
lujinguihua.desc: Robot motion path planning with environment sensing for obstacle avoidance and multi-robot coordination.

fenjianpeisong.name: Sorting & Delivery
fenjianpeisong.desc: Intelligent sorting and delivery system using visual recognition and path optimization for automated classification and precise distribution.

wuliaoshaicha.name: Material Screening
wuliaoshaicha.desc: Uses vision, sensors, and other methods to identify and verify incoming material dimensions, surface quality, pose state, and identification information, ensuring materials meet assembly requirements and match production order data.

wuxulailiao.name: Unordered Picking
wuxulailiao.desc: For randomly stacked parts, uses 3D vision recognition and grasp planning to achieve occlusion-resistant picking, placing parts into temporary sorting buffers or feeders for subsequent orderly feeding.

youxugongliao.name: Ordered Feeding
youxugongliao.desc: From sorted or oriented feeding devices (vibratory bowls, sorting trays, conveyors), uses high-precision vision guidance to control robotic arms for precise pose picking, accurately placing parts into assembly station fixtures or positioning mechanisms.

duowuliaoxietong.name: Multi-Material Sync
duowuliaoxietong.desc: When assembly requires multiple parts in specific sequence or simultaneously, coordinates multiple devices or robotic arms to complete synchronized feeding per assembly process sequence and cycle time requirements.

xialiaofendao.name: Sortation & Diversion
xialiaofendao.desc: Removes completed products or semi-finished goods from assembly stations, sorting them into different transfer containers, trays, or conveyor lines based on inline inspection results (pass/fail) or downstream process routes.

shijuedingwei.name: Pose Sensing & Servo
shijuedingwei.desc: Comprehensively uses vision, force, proximity and other sensors to track workpiece pose in real-time during assembly, with adaptive adjustment forming closed-loop control.

jiguangduizhun.name: Adaptive Mating Alignment
jiguangduizhun.desc: For contact, friction, and tolerance-based mating actions (surface fitting, shaft-hole insertion, snap-fit), uses force control strategies to adaptively adjust execution, preventing jamming or damage.

jixiedingwei.name: Multi-Body Coordinated Positioning
jixiedingwei.desc: Coordinates multiple execution units (dual robotic arms, human-robot, multi-robot) to jointly complete gripping, pose adjustment, and assembly of multi-component, heavy, or complex structures.

luoshuaningsuo.name: Adaptive Connection Control
luoshuaningsuo.desc: Dynamically adjusts connection process parameters (torque, current, temperature, speed, pressure, etc.) based on real-time sensing of workpiece state (material, gap, alignment) to adapt to workpiece variations and environmental changes.

maojieliangjie.name: Connection Path Planning
maojieliangjie.desc: Generates or corrects tool (welding gun, glue gun, screwdriver) motion trajectories and poses in real-time based on actual workpiece features (weld grooves, glue surface shapes, screw hole positions), ensuring correct coverage and optimal orientation.

jiaozhanyajie.name: End-Effector Smart Switching
jiaozhanyajie.desc: For complex assembly tasks requiring multiple connection processes, automatically completes rapid changeover, calibration, and coordinated sequential operation of different end-effectors (electric gun, welding gun, glue gun, etc.).

kakouguding.name: Quality Sensing & Warning
kakouguding.desc: During connection processes, monitors connection state in real-time through multi-sensor fusion (force, vision, acoustic, thermal imaging), including weld pool morphology, adhesive bead continuity, and screw seating, with online quality judgment and early warning.

zhinenghuanxian.name: Smart Changeover
zhinenghuanxian.desc: Records complete process parameters and quality data for each connection, forming traceable 'digital process packages' that can be quickly recalled and adjusted by product model or order for small-batch rapid changeover.

zhuangpeiyanzheng.name: Assembly Online Verification
zhuangpeiyanzheng.desc: Before the assembly is removed, quickly verifies assembly completeness, critical dimensions, or function through vision, force sensing, or functional testing, ensuring defective products don't flow to downstream processes.

chengpinfenjian.name: Product Sorting & Unloading
chengpinfenjian.desc: Based on verification results, picks and places good and defective products separately to designated areas (transfer trays, rework line), while ensuring placement pose meets downstream requirements.

gongweifuwei.name: Station Reset & Cleanup
gongweifuwei.desc: After unloading, inspects fixtures and positioning mechanisms, clears residual materials, and resets the station to prepare for the next assembly cycle, ensuring process consistency.

biaomianhuahen.name: Appearance & Surface Quality
biaomianhuahen.desc: Surface defects (scratches, cracks, burrs, dents, oxidation, oil stains, coating delamination, weld spatter); color and gloss (color difference, glossiness, coating thickness, missed coating, texture); cleanliness (foreign objects, dust, oil stains).

liewen.name: Structural Dimension & Label
liewen.desc: Comprehensive inspection of product geometric dimensions, assembly completeness, and identification information, ensuring physical characteristics and traceability data comply with design specifications.

bianse.name: Product & Packaging Quality
bianse.desc: Packaging appearance (box damage, sealing, banding); packaging accessories (manuals, accessories, cushioning); palletizing and pallets (stability, labels, stretch wrap).

likongshiying.name: Inspection Standardized Modeling
likongshiying.desc: Converts product drawings and acceptance standards into digital inspection templates (defect examples, tolerances, rules).

qumiandamoqi.name: Adaptive Inspection Execution
qumiandamoqi.desc: Automatically generates equipment execution programs (robot paths, camera parameters, algorithm configurations) based on templates.

rousunkongzhi.name: Resource Dynamic Scheduling
rousunkongzhi.desc: Intelligently allocates inspection stations and resources based on production line cycle time and equipment status.

chaoshengbojiance.name: Internal NDT
chaoshengbojiance.desc: Without destroying the product, uses non-destructive testing techniques to inspect internal structures, detecting defects that affect performance and reliability.

dianqiceshi.name: Functional Performance Testing
dianqiceshi.desc: Electrical (continuity, insulation, withstand voltage, LCR, logic); mechanical (insertion force, torque, tensile, hardness, fatigue); sealing (air-tight, water-tight, helium); optical/acoustic (transmittance, color coordinates, noise); environmental (temperature, salt spray, aging).

hunhemaduo.name: Adaptive Position Adjustment
hunhemaduo.desc: Compensates for pallet position errors or lower box displacement through vision-based secondary positioning before placement.

gaosumaduo.name: Adaptive Force-Controlled Placement
gaosumaduo.desc: For deformable products (e.g., cartons), uses force control mode for contact placement, avoiding toppling of already-stacked boxes.

chaizhuomaduo.name: Online Pattern Dynamic Correction
chaizhuomaduo.desc: After stacking several layers, 3D scans the actual stack pattern, compares with the planned model, and re-plans subsequent stacking if deviations are found.

agvdiaodu.name: Inbound Shelving
agvdiaodu.desc: Smart equipment transports completed pallets to designated rack locations.

liticangku.name: AS/RS Docking
liticangku.desc: Coordinates with stacker cranes via smart equipment for high-bay rack storage and retrieval operations.

jingquejizhong.name: Incoming Recognition & Matching
jingquejizhong.desc: In multi-variety mixed production, product specs, dimensions, poses, and incoming sequences constantly change. RGB-D cameras perform inline measurement, barcode recognition, and WMS order verification to handle product changeover diversity.

zidongfengxiang.name: Pick Sequence Decision
zidongfengxiang.desc: Pick point detection algorithms with sequence optimization based on current pallet pattern and incoming order, ensuring each pick best supports pallet stability.

tiebiaodabao.name: Pick Method Adjustment
tiebiaodabao.desc: Different products (cartons, plastic bags, wooden boxes, irregular items) require different pick methods (suction, gripping, embracing). The system auto-selects appropriate methods and dynamically adjusts parameters based on real-time sensing of material properties, dimensions, weight, and surface characteristics.

bizhangguihua.name: Pallet Pattern Tracking
bizhangguihua.desc: Uses 3D vision to identify incoming dimensions, materials, and remaining pallet space, auto-calculating optimal stacking patterns (flat, interlocked, rotated nesting) and generating pick/place sequences with dynamic adjustment during stacking.

zuijianlujing.name: Palletizing Path Optimization
zuijianlujing.desc: During placement, plans smooth collision-free trajectories based on environment sensing (pallet boundaries, stacked materials, surrounding equipment), dynamically correcting via vision or force feedback to handle pallet drift and material sliding.

duojixietong.name: Multi-Robot Stacking Control
duojixietong.desc: For large-format or high-throughput palletizing, employs dual robotic arms or multi-device coordination through master-slave control, path synchronization, and collision prediction for collaborative stacking operations.

zhinengfenjian.name: Unit Reinforcement
zhinengfenjian.desc: Based on material properties (cartons, soft packs, irregular items), stack height, and transport requirements, auto-selects reinforcement methods (stretch wrap, banding, corner protectors) to ensure pallet unit stability during downstream transfer.

lujingpeisong.name: Label Binding
lujingpeisong.desc: Auto-generates labels containing product specs, quantities, batches, and destinations based on pallet order information, precisely applying them to designated positions for reliable physical-information binding.

duodanxietong.name: Logistics Coordination
duodanxietong.desc: After palletizing, automatically notifies and dispatches downstream logistics equipment (AGV, conveyors) for docking, or triggers warehouse entry with status handshake and information synchronization.

tuopanyizai.name: Pallet Transfer
tuopanyizai.desc: Transfers fully processed pallets from palletizing stations to docking points (AGV carrier plates, conveyor entrances) via transfer machines or robots, ensuring pose compliance with downstream equipment interfaces.

xihua.name: Wuxi Xihua New Energy Technology Co.

paike.name: Wuxi Paike New Materials Technology Co.

xiandao.brief: Founded in 2002, Lead Intelligent is a global leader in new energy intelligent manufacturing solutions, covering lithium battery equipment, PV equipment, 3C equipment, intelligent logistics, and hydrogen energy equipment, with over 3,300 authorized patents.
xiandao.progressNote: Lithium battery整线 equipment ranks first globally in market share, PV stringer deliveries exceed 30GW, intelligent logistics system enters large-scale promotion phase.

aotewei.brief: Founded in 2010, Autowell is a renowned intelligent equipment manufacturer in PV, lithium battery and semiconductor fields, covering all four segments of PV industry chain, with core products stringer and wafer sorter holding high market share.
aotewei.progressNote: PV stringer global shipments lead the market, semiconductor bonding equipment has received batch orders, lithium battery module PACK production line continues to scale up.

xinjie.brief: Founded in 2008, Xinje Electric focuses on R&D, production and sales of industrial automation control products, a leading domestic enterprise in industrial automation, with main products including PLC, servo systems, HMI, and machine vision, ranking first among domestic brands in small PLC market share.
xinjie.progressNote: Medium PLC has achieved sales revenue, large PLC R&D continues to advance, cooperating with Huawei Cloud to build embodied intelligence benchmark projects.

rilian.brief: Founded in 2009, Unicomp is a leading enterprise in China's industrial X-ray intelligent inspection field, focusing on R&D, production and sales of industrial X-ray inspection equipment and core components X-ray sources, widely used in IC, new energy batteries, castings and weldings inspection.
rilian.progressNote: Self-developed 160kV open micro-focus X-ray source achieves mass production, 0.8μm defect detection precision reaches international advanced level, AI inspection solutions are rapidly deployed.

tianqi.brief: Founded in 1997, Tianqi has been deeply engaged in automotive intelligent equipment for nearly 30 years, forming three industrial clusters with intelligent equipment as core, lithium battery recycling and robotics as strategic industries, jointly established a company with UBTECH focusing on commercialization of industrial humanoid robots.
tianqi.progressNote: Automotive intelligent equipment business develops steadily, industrial humanoid robot applications enter testing phase, lithium battery recycling business channels continue to expand.

xihua.brief: Founded in 2001, Xihua specializes in R&D, manufacturing and sales of large high-end equipment components, mainly wind turbine gearbox components and injection molding machine thick components, a globally leading manufacturer of large high-end equipment components.
xihua.progressNote: Wind turbine gearbox components global market share is about 20%, IPO fundraising projects focus on capacity expansion and R&D center construction.

paike.brief: Paike New Materials is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production and sales of metal forgings, covering ring forgings, free forgings, precision die forgings, widely used in aerospace, power, petrochemical and other high-end fields, an important supplier of aerospace special alloy forgings.
paike.progressNote: Aerospace forgings business grows rapidly, precision ring forging intelligent production line construction project advances steadily, customers cover Aero Engine Corporation, Aviation Industry Corporation, etc.

delijia.brief: Delijia is a global leading wind turbine gearbox enterprise, focusing on R&D, manufacturing and sales of wind turbine gearboxes, products widely used in onshore and offshore wind power, providing core transmission components for major global wind turbine manufacturers.
delijia.progressNote: IPO fundraising is used for wind power core equipment industrialization project and R&D center construction, consolidating global market competitiveness.

hangya.brief: Hangya Technology focuses on R&D, manufacturing and sales of aero engine precision components, mainly aero engine blades and blisks, having entered the supply chain systems of GE Aviation, Rolls-Royce and other international aero engine giants.
hangya.progressNote: Aero engine blades are delivered in batches to international customers, participating in domestic aero engine development and supporting, capacity continues to expand.

longda.brief: Longda Superalloy is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production and sales of superalloy materials, widely used in aero engines, gas turbines, nuclear power and other high-end equipment fields, one of the important domestic suppliers of superalloy materials.
longda.progressNote: Superalloy materials continue to expand in aero engine applications, leading the construction of high-end alloy industry chain, significant agglomeration effect.

weidao.brief: Micro导 Nano focuses on R&D, production and sales of thin film deposition equipment for semiconductor and PV fields, core products include ALD, CVD equipment, with leading technical advantages in advanced semiconductor processes and PV cell manufacturing.
weidao.progressNote: Semiconductor ALD equipment enters mainstream wafer fab verification, PV equipment continues to upgrade, convertible bond fundraising increases investment in semiconductor equipment field.

shuangliang.brief: Shuangliang is a leading enterprise in energy-saving and environmental protection equipment, mainly engaged in lithium bromide chillers, heat exchangers, air coolers and other energy-saving equipment, as well as polysilicon reduction furnaces, PV modules and other new energy equipment, with deep technical accumulation in energy saving and water conservation.
shuangliang.progressNote: Polysilicon reduction furnace market share leads, PV module business rapidly scales up, energy-saving equipment continues technological iteration.

huadong.brief: Huadong originally focused on container handling equipment and intelligent CNC machine tools, and has actively expanded into PV cell business in recent years, investing in high-efficiency solar cell production bases in Xuzhou and Bozhou.
huadong.progressNote: PV cell business is in capacity ramp-up phase, high-end equipment manufacturing business develops steadily, strategic transformation continues to advance.

beisite.brief: Best focuses on R&D, production and sales of various precision components and tooling fixtures, mainly used in automotive, aviation, refrigeration compressors and other fields, with strong technical strength and customer resources in precision machining.
beisite.progressNote: Automotive parts business grows steadily, aviation parts business continues to expand, precision machining capabilities continue to improve.

xiangsheng.brief: Xiangsheng is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing and sales of ultrasound medical imaging equipment, known as the first ultrasound stock on STAR Market, products cover portable ultrasound, desktop ultrasound, intelligent ultrasound, exported to over 100 countries and regions.
xiangsheng.progressNote: Intelligent ultrasound products continue to iterate, overseas market channels continue to expand, continuous breakthroughs in key core technologies of ultrasound imaging.
